name: Poppy Seed Cookies#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the sugar and eggs until smooth.
2. Add oil, orange juice, and then poppy seeds to the mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Gradually add dry ingredients (flour and baking powder) while mixing well.
4. Roll out small amounts of dough on a floured surface to about 1/8 inch thickness.
5. Cut into desired shapes using a cookie cutter or glass.
6. Place the cookies on a greased cookie sheet.
7. Bake in an oven preheated to 350°F for 10-15 minutes, or until nicely browned.
